seoTitle: Carrick vs Castra — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Carrick and Castra. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Carrick and Castra.
heading: Carrick vs Castra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Carrick, Tasmania and Castra, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Castra has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Carrick (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Carrick or Castra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Carrick has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Castra scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Carrick scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Castra scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Carrick or Castra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Castra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
